opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My fingers are freezing, completely numb and stark white, and my whole body aches so badly I can't move.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The cold set off a severe Raynaud's attack tonight — my fingers went white then blue and now throb — and my joints ache and I'm exhausted; I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: this evening after mild cold exposure
symptom_narrative.character: fingers white then blue then red and painful, with widespread joint ache and fatigue
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both hands (all fingers), plus wrists and knees ache
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: cold-triggered triphasic colour change on my known Raynaud's/UCTD
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: joint ache and crushing fatigue; colour is returning to the fingers
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have UCTD with Raynaud's and get attacks, but this is severe

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: undifferentiated connective tissue disease (positive ANA) with Raynaud's and fatigue

family_history_as_reported.narrative: some autoimmune disease in the family

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my house is cold and I can't use my hands to prepare food or open medication

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the triphasic colour change and joint ache clearly

objective_data_offered.value: both hands went white then blue and are now going pink/red as blood returns; no finger stays white and no black tips
both wrists and knees are a bit swollen and achy
